question: Give me a list of works composed between 1860 and 1880, for small formation (maximum 6 instrumentalists) including 1 piano
sparql:
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX efrbroo: <http://erlangen-crm.org/efrbroo/>
SELECT ?work WHERE { ?work efrbroo:R17_created ?date . FILTER(?date >= "1860-01-01"^^xsd:date && ?date <= "1880-12-31"^^xsd:date) . ?work rdfs:label ?label . FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?label), "piano")) }
execution_result: Got no rows and 1 columns in 0.23s
